Why Wagon Windows

Built on Reliability

We show up on time, do the job right, and leave your windows looking better than you've seen them.

100%

Streak-Free Results

We don't leave until every pane is spotless. If you're not happy, we come back.

Local

Shuswap Owned

We live and work here. We know the Shuswap climate and what your windows deal with every season.

Fast

Easy Booking

Book online in minutes via Calendly, or reach us by phone, email, or text. We respond fast.

Safe

Insured & Professional

Fully insured. We treat your home with care — no shortcuts, no damage, no stress.

Transparent Pricing

Simple, Honest Rates

No surprises, no hidden fees. Most window cleaners won't show you a number — we will.

Small Home
Up to 15 windows
from $169
Exterior clean
Interior + exterior from $229

Most Popular

16–25 windows
from $229

Interior + exterior from $309

26–35 windows
from $299
Exterior clean
Interior + exterior from $389
Book Now
Commercial storefronts from $119/visit — recurring contracts available
Screens $4–$5 each · Tracks from $65 · Hard water stain removal quoted separately
Minimum job fee $119 · Large or custom homes quoted on-site
Where We Work

Serving the Shuswap Region

Wagon Windows is based in Salmon Arm and proudly serves the surrounding Shuswap communities.

Salmon Arm Sorrento Tappen Blind Bay Sicamous Chase Enderby Armstrong Eagle Bay Celista Scotch Creek Grindrod Spallumcheen Swansea Point

Not sure if we cover your area? Send us a message — we're happy to travel for the right job.
